deviations.what: the second NumericContent keeps the sample's original demokit test-resources image path (test-resources/sap/m/demokit/sample/NumericContentIcon/images/grass.jpg) as the icon literal 1:1; abap2UI5 does not serve that static asset, so it does not render offline (the first tile's sap-icon://travel-expense does). The image is archived under ui5/sap.m/NumericContentIcon/images/.
